memberdef.name: AB_OSS_ASYNC_TASK_TRACE_BEGIN_VERBOSITY
memberdef.initializer: UE_LOG_AB(Verbosity, TEXT(">>> %s::%s (AsyncTask method) was called. Args: ") Format, *GetTaskName(), *FString(__func__), ##__VA_ARGS__)

memberdef.name: AB_OSS_ASYNC_TASK_TRACE_END_VERBOSITY
memberdef.initializer: UE_LOG_AB(Verbosity, TEXT("<<< %s::%s (AsyncTask method) has finished execution. ") Format, *GetTaskName(), *FString(__func__), ##__VA_ARGS__)

memberdef.name: AB_ASYNC_TASK_DECLARE_SDK_DELEGATES
memberdef.initializer: void On##Verb##Success(); \ void On##Verb##Error(int32 ErrorCode, const FString& ErrorMessage);

detaileddescription.para: Declares two methods for SDK delegate handlers. Use in a header file to define these for the task, and then use AB_ASYNC_TASK_DEFINE_SDK_DELEGATES to define the bindings to these delegates in the async task logic.

parameterdescription.para: Action that this delegate is handling

memberdef.name: AB_ASYNC_TASK_DECLARE_SDK_DELEGATES_WITH_RESULT
memberdef.initializer: void On##Verb##Success(const SuccessType& Result); \ void On##Verb##Error(int32 ErrorCode, const FString& ErrorMessage);

detaileddescription.para: Declares two methods for SDK delegate handlers. Use in a header file to define these for the task, and then use AB_ASYNC_TASK_DEFINE_SDK_DELEGATES to define the bindings to these delegates in the async task logic.

parameterdescription.para: Action that this delegate is handling
Type that the success delegate will recieve

memberdef.name: AB_ASYNC_TASK_DEFINE_SDK_DELEGATES
memberdef.initializer: const SuccessType On##Verb##SuccessDelegate = SuccessType::CreateRaw(this, &AsyncTaskClass::On##Verb##Success); \ const FErrorHandler On##Verb##ErrorDelegate = FErrorHandler::CreateRaw(this, &AsyncTaskClass::On##Verb##Error);

detaileddescription.para: Defines two delegates for use in an SDK call wrapped in an async task. Success delegate will have the name On{Verb}SuccessDelegate, and be bound to the On{Verb}Success method of the class. Error delegate will have the name On{Verb}ErrorDelegate, and be bound to the On{Verb}Error method of the class.

parameterdescription.para: Name of the class that we are binding delegate methods to
Name of the action that is being handled by the two delegates, effects the name of the final delegates
Delegate type for the success delegate

detaileddescription.para: Convenience macro for async tasks to ensure that a expression evaluates to true, otherwise throwing an InvalidState error in the task. This will also stop execution of the task by returning out.

parameterdescription.para: Expression that you want to evaluate to true, or fail the task
Message to log in a trace if the expression is false. This will automatically be wrapped in TEXT macro, so no need to do that manually.

memberdef.name: AB_ASYNC_TASK_REQUEST_FAILED

detaileddescription.para: Convenience macro to log a request error and fail a task.

parameterdescription.para: Message to log for the request that failed
Error code for the request that failed
Error message for the request that failed

detaileddescription.para: Enum to describe what state an async task is in currently
Enum to describe what state an async task finished in beyond just a success and fail state.
